ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15th November
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a quick reminder that the final submission for our semester project is due on **15th November**. Please ensure that your deliverables—code, documentation, and the presentation deck—are uploaded to the shared drive by **23:59** on that day.

If you have any questions or need an extension for a valid reason, let me know as soon as possible.

Thanks for all your hard work!

Best regards,
Alex Martinez
Project Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Award Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Student,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient of the **Global Excellence Scholarship** for the upcoming academic year. Congratulations on this prestigious award!

In order to finalize the award and secure your scholarship funds, we require you to verify your personal information and submit the necessary documents. Failure to complete this verification within **48 hours** will result in the forfeiture of the scholarship and potential penalties on your financial aid status.

Please click the secure link below to access the verification portal:

<URL>

Once you have logged in, upload the required documents and confirm your acceptance. If you do not act within the allotted time, your scholarship will be revoked and you may face a delay in receiving your financial aid.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Dr. Emily Carter
Director, Scholarship Office
University of Prestige
